name: KENJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - SENMEIKEN (SWORD ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - BLURRED SWORD)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, Mob

You must be under the effects of Speed Rank 2 or greater, and your weapon must be sheathed. Make a single melee attack against all creatures in the area, which deals an additional 2d4 damage, +1d4 per 4 levels (up to 6d4 total). This additional damage is not multiplied on critical hits, and you cannot apply sneak attack damage with these attacks.

After using this technique, the used weapon can be sheathed or left unsheathed (your choice).

system.area: Up to one adjacent square per 3 levels
